title: BS in Data Science and Behavioral Neuroscience - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
BS in Data Science and Behavioral Neuroscience - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
BS in Data Science and Behavioral Neuroscience
Apply now
Request info
The BS in Data Science and Behavioral Neuroscience is a combined major (Khoury College and the College of Science) that integrates biology, psychology, computer science, and data science as you explore the neural circuits underlying brain mechanisms and pathological states — giving rise to behavioral functions. You’ll also gain skills in data manipulation and storage, machine learning, data mining, and information visualization, equipping you to execute brain-mapping efforts like human neuroconnectivity maps.
Explore program requirements in the course catalog
Program details
Career prospects
Career prospects
This program will prepare you for careers in a range of industries at the intersection of data science and human behavior, from healthcare to gaming to AI and more. Possible careers include:
Neuroinformatics specialist
Neuroscience researcher
User experience (UX) researcher
Health data analyst
Biostatistician
Co-ops and internships
Co-ops and internships
Students in this combined major have opportunities to build on their classroom learning in industry settings through co-ops. Recent co-op experiences include:
Co-op scientist in Image Analysis & Data Visualization at Merck Laboratories
Research and development (R&D) in machine learning at Johnson & Johnson
Learn more about co-ops
Research opportunities
Research opportunities
Partner with top-tier researchers in our renowned facilities as you search for innovative solutions to real-world challenges. Research areas include:
Computational biology
Human-centered computing
Personal health informatics
Explore research at Khoury College
Learning outcomes
Learning outcomes
In this program, you’ll learn to:
Apply design principles in the construction of software systems of varying complexity.
Use current techniques, skills, and tools necessary for effective and secure computing practice.
Apply data science theory, methods, and tools to translate data into clear, actionable insights.
Campus location
Boston
Located in the heart of Boston, Northeastern’s oldest campus is home to a vibrant community of students, researchers, and faculty working across disciplines to build a better world through CS.
Explore Boston's campus
Applications and admissions

Degree costs
Degree costs
Pursuing a world-class education is an investment in your future. It’s also one of the most important decisions you’ll ever make. Visit our Undergraduate Admissions site to find current Northeastern University costs. You can also estimate the cost of your degree using our College Cost Estimator or Net Price Calculator.
Find and estimate degree costs
Financial aid and scholarships
Financial aid and scholarships
Northeastern University offers a range of financial aid and scholarship opportunities to help you fund your education. You’ll receive an initial financial aid package that outlines your options after admission. Once you enroll, Khoury College has multiple scholarship opportunities for current students to continue supporting your studies. We also encourage all students to submit the FAFSA to determine your eligibility for federal aid and loans.
Learn more about scholarship opportunities
Have questions?
Have questions?
Let us know if you have any questions about the application or enrollment process. We are here to help!
Contact an enrollment counselor
Meet our faculty
Get to know the engaged, experienced professors who are here to support you every step of the way.
View all faculty
Michelle Borkin
Michelle Borkin is an associate professor at Khoury College. She develops novel visualization techniques and tools to enable new data discoveries in fields ranging from cardiology to astronomy.
Read bio
Visit the College of Science
The BS in Data Science and Behavioral Neuroscience program is an interdisciplinary collaboration with the College of Science.
